name: Isolated Daemon Min vs Max
description: Daemon formation using min_vs_max processing. Compares with avg_vs_avg: here the best excitatory dendrite competes against the best inhibitory. Sharper winner selection per neuron.

config.description: Same daemon topology as Isolated Daemon but with min_vs_max: tension = max(excitatory) + min(inhibitory). Only the strongest excitatory and inhibitory dendrites count. Compare daemon shape and stability with avg_vs_avg.
